title: Add Pollinations AI Text Generation API to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Pollinations AI Text Generation API](https://farl.github.io/pollinations-ai-text-generation/) to chat
- A web interface for the Pollinations AI API (gen.pollinations.ai). It uses the pollinations.ai API for text generation with multiple OpenAI-compatible models, image analysis (vision), text-to-speech w

Fixes #10468

gist.headline: Chatting in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: Someone built a slick new web interface for our text API and parked it in the Greenhouse. It handles text, vision, and speech all in one cozy place.
gist.summary: Added the Pollinations AI Text Generation web interface—a community-built chat app supporting multiple models, vision, and TTS—to the Greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: You can now find a ready-to-use, multi-model chat UI in our community apps list, perfect for testing text, vision, and audio endpoints without writing code.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds a chat web interface to the community apps (Greenhouse). Visuals should include Polly the bee in a literal greenhouse setting, interacting with a chat interface or speech bubbles alongside the Monitor Robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot and a chunky monitor robot sitting inside a lush digital greenhouse. The robot's screen displays colorful chat bubbles, while Polly waters a glowing code-plant nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and inviting.
